page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by the AMD EPYC 9T25 processor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz with 1.0 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is not active. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this server type.

The dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio make this instance a cost-efficient option for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. It is suitable for tasks such as web serving, batch processing, and lightweight computational workloads where consistent CPU performance is prioritized over high memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual server powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 4 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring consistent CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and does not include local storage, meaning all storage must be attached externally. With its dedicated CPU resources and compute-focused memory ratio, the ecs.c9a.xlarge is designed for workloads such as web serving, batch processing, and distributed compute tasks that require steady processing power without high memory demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9a.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 CPU cores at 2.7 GHz, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and a balanced two-gigabyte-per-core memory configuration for consistent processing workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 physical cores at 2.7 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory with a 2.0 GB per core ratio
KVM hypervisor with no bundled local storage
Optimized for compute-heavy workloads and web serving
